feedback.text: Hello. I would love for this law to add video games that are always online or live service, since i have in the past lost the ability to play games i have paid for, see overwatch 1, the crew, anthem and APB reloaded. While some games are at risk of being unable to play parts or even the complete game. Here is a list of game that I love to play like titanfall 2, destiny 2 and many more. The games listed here are games that I would love to able to play again as a way to persevere art and to show the next generation.
